entity.summary: Polygon automated-market-maker decentralized exchange and DeFi platform with current liquidity, swap volume, fees, and active spot trading.
entity.notes: Current first-party Gravity Finance domain remains reachable. DefiLlama independently identifies Gravity Finance as a Polygon AMM DEX and reports current TVL, fees, and non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume, supporting active classification.

evidence.title: Gravity Finance official website
evidence.notes: Current dedicated first-party Gravity Finance domain remains reachable at review time.

evidence.title: Gravity Finance metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies Gravity Finance as a Polygon AMM DEX and reports current TVL, fees, and non-zero 30-day, 7-day, and 24-hour DEX volume.

evidence.title: Gravity Finance DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Gravity Finance as a Polygon decentralized exchange.
